Job.description: Job represents a job in the system.

JobContext.description: `JobContext` holds contextual information for a job.

JobDefaults.description: `JobDefaults` defines default values for job tasks.

JobId.description: RFC 4122 UUID or 22-character base57 short job ID emitted by the coordinator

JobState.description:
State machine for a [`Job`].

Valid transitions:
- `Pending` -> `Scheduled`
- `Scheduled` -> `Running`
- `Running` -> `Completed` | `Failed` | `Cancelled`
- `Failed` | `Cancelled` -> `Restart`
- `Restart` -> `Pending`

JobSummary.description: `JobSummary` provides a summary view of a job.

Metrics.description: Metrics holds aggregated metrics across all twerk components.

Mount.description: Mount represents a filesystem mount configuration.

Page_JobSummary.description: Page represents a paginated result set

items.description: `JobSummary` provides a summary view of a job.

Page_ScheduledJobSummary.description: Page represents a paginated result set

items.description: `ScheduledJobSummary` provides a summary view of a scheduled job.

Page_TaskLogPart.description: Page represents a paginated result set

items.description: `TaskLogPart` represents a part of a task's log output.

Probe.description: Probe defines health check configuration for a task.

ScheduledJobSummary.description: `ScheduledJobSummary` provides a summary view of a scheduled job.

Task.description: Task is the basic unit of work that a Worker can handle.

TaskLimits.description: `TaskLimits` defines resource limits for a task.

TaskLogPart.description: `TaskLogPart` represents a part of a task's log output.

TaskRetry.description: `TaskRetry` defines retry configuration for a task.

TaskState.description: `TaskState` represents the list of states that a task can be in at any given moment.

Trigger.description: A trigger entity with state and variant information.

TriggerState.description: The runtime state of a trigger.

WaitMode.description: Whether the create-job endpoint should block until the job completes.

info.description: Task scheduling and job queue management API
info.title: Twerk API

get.summary:
GET /api/v1/triggers
# Errors
This handler does not currently return `Err(ApiError)` directly; persistence and serialization
failures are converted into HTTP responses.

post.summary:
POST /api/v1/triggers
# Errors
This handler does not currently return `Err(ApiError)` directly; request validation, trigger
creation, and serialization failures are converted into HTTP responses.

get.summary:
GET /api/v1/triggers/{id}
# Errors
This handler does not currently return `Err(ApiError)` directly; invalid identifiers, missing
triggers, and serialization failures are converted into HTTP responses.

put.summary:
Handler for `PUT /api/v1/triggers/{id}`.
# Errors
This handler does not currently return `Err(ApiError)` directly; request validation, trigger
update, and serialization failures are converted into HTTP responses.

get.summary:
GET /jobs
# Errors
Returns an error when the requested page of jobs cannot be loaded from the datastore.

parameters.description: Whether to block until the job completes (true/false/blocking)
parameters.name: wait

requestBody.description: Job definition as JSON or YAML

200.description: Job created or completed when wait=blocking

400.description: Invalid job definition or unsupported content type

post.summary:
POST /jobs
# Errors
Returns an error when the request body cannot be parsed, the job fails validation, the
datastore or broker operation fails, or the blocking wait path times out.

parameters.description: The job ID as either an RFC 4122 UUID or a 22-character base57 short ID
parameters.name: id

get.summary:
GET /jobs/{id}
# Errors
Returns an error when the job cannot be loaded or its tasks cannot be fetched from the
datastore.

400.description: Job cannot be cancelled in its current state

post.summary:
POST /jobs/{id}/cancel
# Errors
Returns an error when the job lookup or update fails, the broker publish fails, or the job
cannot be cancelled in its current state.

400.description: Job cannot be cancelled in its current state

put.summary:
PUT /jobs/{id}/cancel
# Errors
Returns an error when the job lookup or update fails, the broker publish fails, or the job
cannot be cancelled in its current state.

get.summary:
GET /jobs/{id}/log
# Errors
Returns an error when the job cannot be loaded or the requested log page cannot be fetched.

put.summary:
PUT /jobs/{id}/restart
# Errors
Returns an error when the job lookup or update fails, the broker publish fails, or the job
cannot be restarted from its current state.

get.summary:
GET /scheduled-jobs
# Errors
Returns an error when the requested page of scheduled jobs cannot be loaded.

requestBody.description: Scheduled job definition as JSON or YAML

post.summary:
POST /scheduled-jobs
# Errors
Returns an error when the request body cannot be parsed, the scheduled job fails validation,
persistence fails, or the creation event cannot be serialized or published.
